repositoryOverview: This repository contains a .NET contracts library for a loan selling and management system in the financial sector. Written in F#, it defines data types and models used for loan trading, interest calculations, and financial operations.

dataEntities.name: Loan
dataEntities.description: Core entity representing a loan with comprehensive information including borrower data, financial details, and loan status

dataEntities.name: PagedLoanItem
dataEntities.description: Summary view of a loan used for listing and pagination purposes

dataEntities.name: Invoice
dataEntities.description: Represents an invoice for loan purchases

dataEntities.name: Discrepancy
dataEntities.description: Tracks differences between loan values and reference values

patterns.name: Batch Processing
patterns.description: Enables bulk operations on loans through batched processing

patterns.name: Domain-Driven Design
patterns.description: Uses domain models to represent complex financial entities and operations

findings.description: Personally Identifiable Information (PII) is marked with attributes in the codebase which indicates sensitive data handling requirements

keyFiles.description: Core loan entity definitions and loan-related operations
Models for loan purchase invoicing and receipt generation
Batch update operations for loan purchase dates
Models for tracking and managing loan data discrepancies
Handles interest reversal operations on loans
Defines purchase account structures and mappings for specific loan types
Models for loan grooming operations including recovery requests and responses
Attribute for marking personally identifiable information in the system
